subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the sweet-scented breeze of divine favor, and the secret and mystery of the All-Merciful in the mirror of reality and ocean of servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بشمیم نسیم عنایت سر یزدان و راز رحمن را در اینه حقیقت و دریای عبودیت
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @nearness and remoteness, @knowledge; recognition of God
